moments.title: World Cup Round of 32 Intensifies
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 continues today with the Round of 32 matches, as teams battle for a spot in the next stage of the tournament hosted across the USA, Canada, and Mexico.

angles.name: Knockout Thrills
angles.copy: It's win or go home! The FIFA World Cup 2026 hits the Round of 32 today. Who are you backing to make it through? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: England's Journey
angles.copy: England secured their spot in the Round of 16 yesterday! Relive the highlights and look ahead to their next challenge. #ThreeLions

angles.name: Global Showdown
angles.copy: From North America, the World Cup drama unfolds! Don't miss today's Round of 32 clashes. Every kick counts. #FIFAWorldCup

moments.title: Wimbledon Second Round Action
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, continues today with the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles Second Round matches at the All England Lawn Tennis and Croquet Club.

angles.name: Grass Court Battles
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream are out, and the rackets are smashing! Wimbledon's Second Round is in full swing today. Who are you watching? #Wimbledon

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Any British hopefuls making it through to the next round at Wimbledon? Catch all the action from the All England Club today. #Tennis

moments.title: British Grand Prix Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix at Silverstone is set to begin tomorrow, July 3rd, bringing high-octane Formula 1 racing to Northamptonshire until July 5th.

angles.name: Start Your Engines
angles.copy: Get ready for the roar! The British Grand Prix starts tomorrow at Silverstone. Who's taking pole position this year? #F1 #BritishGP

angles.name: Silverstone Weekend
angles.copy: Three days of pure speed and adrenaline! The British Grand Prix is set for a thrilling weekend at Silverstone. Who's your favourite driver? #Motorsport

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup, hosted in various UK locations, concludes on July 5th with the final match.

angles.name: Cricket Finale
angles.copy: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup reaches its climax this Sunday! Who will be crowned champions in the UK? #T20WorldCup

angles.name: Women's Cricket
angles.copy: History in the making! Don't miss the final of the ICC Women's T20 World Cup this weekend. Celebrate the best of women's sport. #Cricket

moments.title: Harry Styles Continues Wembley Residency
moments.blurb: Harry Styles continues his highly anticipated residency at Wembley Stadium in London with shows on July 3rd and 4th.

angles.name: Harry's House Party
angles.copy: Another chance to see Harry Styles at Wembley this weekend! If you're going, get ready for a dazzling show. #HarryStyles

angles.name: Wembley Weekend
angles.copy: Harry Styles is taking over Wembley! What's your favourite track you hope he plays? #LoveOnTour

moments.title: Def Leppard Rock The O2
moments.blurb: Legendary rock band Def Leppard are performing live at The O2 Arena in London tonight, July 2nd.

angles.name: Rocking The O2
angles.copy: Tonight's the night for Def Leppard at The O2! Get ready for a night of classic rock anthems. Which song are you most excited for? #DefLeppard

angles.name: Still Rocking
angles.copy: Def Leppard still bringing the house down! If you're at The O2 tonight, send us your best air guitar moves. #ClassicRock

moments.title: Lytham Festival Underway
moments.blurb: Lytham Festival continues until July 5th, bringing a variety of acts to Lytham Green.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Lytham Festival is in full swing! Who's heading to Lytham Green this weekend for some incredible live music? #LythamFestival

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Sun, sea, and sensational music! Lytham Festival is the place to be until Sunday. What's been your highlight so far? #FestivalSeason

moments.title: UK Singles Chart Toppers
moments.blurb: The current UK Official Singles Chart Top 75, as of June 28th, features 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender and Olivia Dean at number one.

angles.name: Chart King & Queen
angles.copy: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean are reigning supreme on the UK Singles Chart with 'Rein Me In'! Have you heard the number one track? #UKCharts

angles.name: New Music Friday Prep
angles.copy: Before tomorrow's new releases drop, let's celebrate the current UK No.1: 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender & Olivia Dean. What's your top track right now? #NewMusic

moments.title: New UK TV Shows Launching in July
moments.blurb: Several new and returning TV series are premiering in the UK this July, including 'Ann Droid' on BBC One, 'CIA' on Sky Witness, 'The Dark' on ITV, and 'Elle' on Prime Video.

angles.name: Summer Binge-Watching
angles.copy: New month, new shows! July is packed with fresh UK TV, from comedy with 'Ann Droid' to thrillers like 'The Dark'. What's first on your watch list? #NewTV

angles.name: Legally Blonde Prequel
angles.copy: Excited for 'Elle', the 'Legally Blonde' prequel, hitting Prime Video in July? Get ready to see how Elle Woods began! #ElleWoods

moments.title: Happy 34th Birthday Burna Boy
moments.blurb: Nigerian superstar Burna Boy celebrates his 34th birthday today, July 2nd.

angles.name: African Giant's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the African Giant, Burna Boy! Drop your favourite Burna Boy track to celebrate! #BurnaBoy

angles.name: Celebrate Burna Boy
angles.copy: Today we're celebrating Burna Boy turning 34! What's your go-to song from the global sensation? #AfricanGiant

moments.title: Happy 42nd Birthday Michelle Branch
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Michelle Branch, known for hits like 'Everywhere', turns 42 today, July 2nd.

angles.name: Michelle Branch Turns 42
angles.copy: Happy 42nd Birthday to the fantastic Michelle Branch! What's your favourite song from her? #MichelleBranch

angles.name: Everywhere We Go
angles.copy: Celebrating Michelle Branch's birthday today! Her music defined a generation. Which of her tracks takes you back? #Early00s

moments.title: Happy 56th Birthday Monie Love
moments.blurb: British rapper and radio personality Monie Love, a pioneer of UK hip-hop, celebrates her 56th birthday today, July 2nd.

angles.name: Celebrating Monie Love
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the iconic British rapper and radio legend, Monie Love! A true pioneer. #MonieLove

angles.name: Hip-Hop History
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to Monie Love! Her influence on UK hip-hop is undeniable. What's your favourite track? #UKHipHop

moments.title: Pride in London 2026
moments.blurb: Pride in London is set to transform the capital into a vibrant celebration of LGBTQIA+ visibility, community, and equality on July 4th.

angles.name: London Celebrates Pride
angles.copy: Get ready, London! Pride in London is this Saturday, July 4th, celebrating LGBTQIA+ visibility and community. #PrideInLondon

angles.name: Show Your Pride
angles.copy: This weekend, London comes alive for Pride! How are you celebrating and showing your support for the LGBTQIA+ community? #Pride2026

moments.title: Monmouth Medieval Festival
moments.blurb: The Monmouth Medieval Festival takes place this weekend, July 4-5, transforming the Welsh town into a lively medieval celebration with reenactments and family-friendly activities.

angles.name: Step Back in Time
angles.copy: Hear ye, hear ye! The Monmouth Medieval Festival is this weekend! Head to Monmouth for a journey back in time with reenactments and fun for all ages. #Monmouth

angles.name: Welsh Medieval Fun
angles.copy: Looking for something different this weekend? The Monmouth Medieval Festival promises knights, markets, and merriment in Wales! #WalesEvents

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday RZA
moments.blurb: American rapper, record producer, and founding member of the Wu-Tang Clan, RZA, celebrates his 57th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Forever
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the legendary RZA! Drop your favourite Wu-Tang Clan track in the comments! #RZA #WuTang

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of the one and only RZA on Sunday! His influence on music is immense. #HipHop

moments.title: Happy 51st Birthday 50 Cent
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: It's Your Birthday!
angles.copy: Go, go, go, go! It's 50 Cent's 51st Birthday on Monday! What's your favourite track from the rap icon? #50Cent

angles.name: Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Monday is 50 Cent's birthday! Get ready to celebrate the legend turning 51. #Rap

moments.title: Happy 86th Birthday Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: A Little Help From His Friends
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr on Tuesday! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his drumming? #RingoStarr

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: The legendary Ringo Starr turns 86 on Tuesday! Celebrate with us by sharing your favourite memory of The Beatles. #TheBeatles

moments.title: RHS Hampton Court Palace Garden Festival
moments.blurb: The RHS Hampton Court Palace Garden Festival, the world's largest flower festival, begins on July 8th and runs until July 12th.

angles.name: Floral Extravaganza
angles.copy: Get ready for a burst of colour! The RHS Hampton Court Palace Garden Festival starts next Wednesday. Who's excited for the world's largest flower festival? #HamptonCourt

angles.name: Gardening Inspiration
angles.copy: Green fingers assemble! The stunning RHS Hampton Court Palace Garden Festival is almost here, offering endless gardening inspiration. #GardenFestival

moments.title: Happy 62nd Birthday Courtney Love
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter and actress Courtney Love, frontwoman of Hole, celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Punk Rock Queen
angles.copy: Happy 62nd Birthday to the iconic Courtney Love! What's your favourite Hole track? #CourtneyLove #Hole

angles.name: Celebrating a Legend
angles.copy: Next Friday, we're celebrating the birthday of the incredible Courtney Love! Her impact on rock music is undeniable. #Grunge

moments.title: Happy 87th Birthday Mavis Staples
moments.blurb: American gospel and R&B singer Mavis Staples, known for her work with The Staple Singers, celebrates her 87th birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Soulful Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 87th Birthday to the legendary Mavis Staples on Saturday! Her voice is pure gold. #MavisStaples

angles.name: Gospel & R&B Icon
angles.copy: Celebrate the incredible Mavis Staples turning 87 this weekend! What's your favourite Staple Singers classic? #SoulMusic
